title: Run Crundle on Broken Windows theory

log.context: Run Crundle on Broken Windows theory

Done. Crundle's response was generated and posted to Discord. Key highlights from the response:

- Crundle affirmed the theory is "correct in the way that scent is correct" — you follow neglect to its source
- Addressed the cause/effect debate by analogy: a rotting tunnel support doesn't get debated, it gets replaced
- Observed the room twice (a floor crack, a drain smelling of copper), staying true to the persona
- Concluded: "Fix the window. Not because it prevents all crime. Because an unbrok...(truncated)
